user.title: Connect AIFA Smart
user.description: Sign in with your AIFA Smart account.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate AIFA Smart
reauth_confirm.description: The stored tokens for {email} have expired. Enter the password to obtain a new session.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to reach the AIFA Smart API.

abort.already_configured: This AIFA Smart account is already configured.

catalog_refresh_failing.title: AIFA catalog refresh is failing
catalog_refresh_failing.description: The integration could not refresh AC capability metadata from AIFA's Firebase Remote Config ({kind}). Control commands still work, but new AC models added by AIFA won't appear correctly until the integration is updated. Detail: {detail}

polling_failing.title: AIFA Smart API unreachable
polling_failing.description: Sustained polling failures for entry {entry_id}. Check that Home Assistant can reach the AIFA Smart cloud API, then review the integration log for details. The notification clears automatically once polling succeeds again.
